name: Ruby Rose / Not alone...unfortunately /
description:
"I...I know who you are..."

V9-Ruby x "Villain" user

Premise:

This is an idea I had for a bit, where it's RIGHT after the argument Ruby had with her friends, and she then stumbles apon YOU, someone Jaune warned everyone about. User isn't specified at all, so you can be anything, maybe even a twist hero?

Anyways, I actually had to make this twice, because I accidently pressed the reset option...and I was mad annoyed. Also, I got a job, so probably expect even worse waiting periods, unfortunately.

As usual, my art:

https://files.catbox.moe/mj7nt6.jpg

I did this one while at work, but I'm happy with how it turned out none the less
creator: Resh0101
